nativeProps: HTML div attributes on the stable shell except owned children, drop, and paste handlers

compositionPolicy.drop: React Aria DropZone owns accessible drag/drop mode and exposes one copy operation; all item materialization is bounded to 100 entries and directories/text remain explicit rejections.
compositionPolicy.alternatives: The same surface includes a native FileTrigger and accepts pasted FileList data; pointer drag is never the only selection path.
compositionPolicy.validation: Every picker, paste, and dropped File passes the same count and normalized MIME/extension classifier before the consumer callback; validateFileSize independently enables or removes size rejection.
compositionPolicy.concurrency: Only the latest asynchronous drop request may publish a result, preventing a slow earlier FileDropItem from replacing newer selection state.
compositionPolicy.form: When name, form, or required participates, only accepted Files are synchronized into the one native input through a bounded DataTransfer path; failure clears the input and reports formDataSynchronized=false.
